task_objective: Benchmark ibis-profiling against ydata-profiling after feature updates and perform parity check.
design_decisions: Used sys.executable in run_benchmarks.py to ensure subprocesses use the correct virtual environment.
Updated compare_outputs.py to handle new metrics like monotonicity and extreme values (lists).
Reduced dimensionality for 10M and 20M 'Full' runs to 10 and 5 columns respectively to avoid OOM during Spearman rank computation.
Stored official comparison reports in /tmp/ibis-profiling/reports_comparison/ for persistent access.
results: Benchmarks confirmed that Ibis remains significantly faster (>20x for 10k rows) and more memory-efficient (>20x) than YData. Statistical parity was verified for core metrics, and new features (Spearman, Extreme Values) were successfully benchmarked and verified.
